purpose: define what ORRO product tooling may do when pinned witnessd or Depone engines are unavailable or mismatched

allowed_responses.response: report missing root and suggest bootstrap dry-run or explicit execute with allow-network
report expected and actual commits; require intentional engine-lock update PR or checkout correction
stop with clear setup blocker; do not silently use main or a nearby commit

human_actions: correct local checkout to the pinned commit
run bootstrap dry-run to inspect setup steps
run bootstrap execute with explicit allow-network when network checkout is intended
open an engine-lock update PR if the product candidate should move to newer engine commits
